allow: Bash(sqlite-utils query "c:/Code/Projects/TabHistorian/src/TabHistorian/bin/Debug/net10.0/tabhistorian.db" "SELECT ''snapshots'' as tbl, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM snapshots UNION ALL SELECT ''windows'', COUNT\(*\) FROM windows UNION ALL SELECT ''tabs'', COUNT\(*\) FROM tabs")

Bash("/c/Users/Joe/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Links/sqlite3.exe" "/c/Users/Joe/OneDrive/Documents/TabHistorian/tabhistorian.db" "SELECT t.current_url, t.title FROM tabs t JOIN windows w ON t.window_id = w.id WHERE w.snapshot_id = 10 AND \(t.current_url LIKE ''%apple.com%'' OR t.current_url LIKE ''%google.com%'' OR t.current_url LIKE ''%microsoft.com%''\) ORDER BY t.current_url;")
